detail_desc:
Not a mage himself, this young man has found enough suppliers in town to keep
his shop well stocked, even overstocked at times.
long_desc: A young man wearing mirrored sunglasses and a tie-dyed robe stands smoking a home grown 'cigarette' behind the counter.

detail_desc:
A small man, by anyone's standards.  He has a strange glint in his eyes which
some men get when obsessed with money.
long_desc: The town provisioner stands here ready to serve your needs.

detail_desc:
Elias carries the haughty look that says, "My daddy is an important man, so
respect me, or I'll tell.  "
long_desc: Elias Dalston, son of the original Dalston, waits impatiently while you shop.

detail_desc:
Maris is a large man, still very much in shape in spite of his years.  He
looks very capable of using any of his fine weapons.
long_desc: Maris waits with a smile while you browse his goods.

detail_desc:
Probably one of the more stunning older woman you have ever come across,
Ilena exudes confidence and knowledge.
long_desc: Maris' wife, Ilena, stands here waiting to help you.

detail_desc:
You notice a tired look in his face.  He looks like he is a bit too worried
about his fortune to worry about sleep.
long_desc: The balding man is sitting here at his desk, busily counting the day's sales.

detail_desc: Not a man to be kept waiting, Vulcevic begins to tap his foot impatiently.
long_desc: Captain Vulcevic, a retired captain from the naval forces, impatiently stands here.

detail_desc: He looks like a competent young bootmaker.
long_desc: Daron the Bootmaster stands behind the counter with a shoe horn in one hand and a sanitary footy in the other.

detail_desc:
He looks like he could tear your arms out at the socket without an upwards
glance.
long_desc:
The blacksmith is here, pounding on his anvil.  So intent on his work he seems,
it gives you small start when he asks, "may I help you?" without looking up.

detail_desc:
The Wellmaster looks tired, but in a good way.  It must be true when they say
that Alquandon river water is the best in Dibrova.
long_desc: The Wellmaster is standing behind the counter.

detail_desc:
The Postmaster seems like a happy old man, though a bit sluggish.  He worries
about the reputation of the DMS (Dibrova Mail Service), as many people seem to
think that it is slow.  Perhaps if he were to brush the cobwebs from his uniform
it would help to make a better impression.
long_desc: The head postmaster is standing here, waiting to help you with your mail.

detail_desc:
True enough, she is smiling at you, and she's not a bad looker, but I think
it's all part of the job.  Don't get your hopes up.
long_desc: The lease manager sits behind her desk, smiling at you.

detail_desc:
Granny looks as if she could be 110 years old, so frail and withered she
seems.
long_desc: Granny sits here in here rocker, calmly knitting an afghan. "Kin ah hilp yus?", she asks an old, tired voice.

detail_desc: The man gives a little smirk as you look him over.  "Nervous?  ", he asks.
long_desc: A man dealing cards in a dark suit sits behind a table, waiting to win your money.

detail_desc:
Grigor wears a round fishing hat covered in lures and smells like bad...
Well, like fish.
long_desc: Grigor leans on his counter here, tying lures.

detail_desc: Franz may not be what many would term a CONFIDENT heterosexual.
long_desc: Franz stands here, sizing you up, one hand resting delicately under one chin, the other on his elbow.

detail_desc: A solidly built 6'5, this man could wallup three of you.
long_desc: The trainer stands ready, waiting to train you in whatever stat you wish to increase.

detail_desc:
Obviously a spinster, this woman would most probably give all she owns for a
man of her own.
long_desc:
The librarian, a plump woman in her mid-thirties, sits at a desk reading a romance
novel.

detail_desc: A man used to seeing vast sums of gold.
long_desc: The banker stands behind one of his tellers, smiling.

detail_desc:
Even though your guildmaster looks old and tired, you can clearly see the
vast amount of knowledge she possesses.  She is wearing fine magic clothing, and
you notice that she is surrounded by a blue shimmering aura.
long_desc: Your guildmaster is studying a spellbook while preparing to cast a spell.

detail_desc:
You are in no doubt that this guildmaster is truly close to your God; he has
a peaceful, loving look.  You notice that he is surrounded by a white aura.
long_desc: Your guildmaster is praying to your God here.

detail_desc:
You realize that whenever your guildmaster moves, you fail to notice it - the
way of the true thief.  He is dressed in the finest clothing, having the
appearance of an ignorant fop.
long_desc:
A man who looks as if he has had all he could ever need in this world is
sitting here, could he be a guildmaster?

detail_desc:
This is your master.  Big and strong with bulging muscles.  Several scars
across his body proves that he was using arms before you were born.  He has a
calm look on his face.
long_desc: Your guildmaster is sitting here picking his teeth with a dagger.

detail_desc:
Not a mage herself, Clariss was once married to a mage who taught her many of
his secrets, including those secrets dealing with the making of potions.
long_desc:
Clariss, a heavy set, jovial woman stands here with her arms folded across
her ample bosom, awaiting your pleasure.

detail_desc:
His intense knowledge of every kind of steed makes him seem almost bookish,
but when he talks, you can see his knowledge also comes from experience.
long_desc: The horse trader sits behind his desk, patiently waiting.

detail_desc:
This man is none other than the founding father of the fraternal order of
assassins.  Every idea, concept, and belief that is instilled in every assassin
while training came straight from this man.
long_desc: An man dressed all in black stands here.

detail_desc:
He is an expert warrior who has attained knighthood through countless
chivalrous deeds.  His duty is to protect the Guild of Swordsmen and his extreme
skill combined with his experience in warfare makes him a deadly opponent.
long_desc: A knight is guarding the entrance.

detail_desc:
This man is obviously used to the power he wields.  A man to be reckoned
with.
long_desc:
The Magistrate sits behind his desk, eyeing you as if you have done
something wrong.

detail_desc: Obviously not only a skilled thief, but a trained killer.
long_desc: Rapas the Rat stands in this small shop, ready to serve your needs.

detail_desc: A kind smile on her care worn face, this woman is perfect for her job.
long_desc: A nurse waits here, syringe in hand.

detail_desc: What the hell are you looking at, dickweed?
long_desc: A street tough stands here, looking angry at the world.

detail_desc: Lean and wiry, this man almost blends into the wall he leans against.
long_desc:
A ranger leans against the inner trunk of the tree here, waiting to help
you to the next level.

detail_desc: It is apparent that this man would much rather be out killing someone.
long_desc: A man tends shop here, a wry smile on face.

detail_desc:
A young, quick-witted man, the bartender loves to meet new people and hear
their stories as they rest in his bar.
long_desc:
The bartender gives you a quick once-over, decides you're okay, and asks
how he can help you.

detail_desc: A tired looking nurse.
long_desc: A nurse is here, making her rounds.

detail_desc:
This man obviously will brook no argument in his place.  A real his way or
the highway kind of guy.
long_desc: The bartender turns to you, folds his massive arms, and growls from under his thick beard, "What'll it be?"

detail_desc: This woman may not be quite a goddess, but she sure comes close.
long_desc: A scantily clad waitress hands you your menu with a more-than-friendly smile and tells you, "anything you need, ANYTHING, just let me know."

detail_desc: Hmmm...  Wonder where he got that coin he is playing with.
long_desc: A waiter who knows where all his customers keep their money is standing here.

detail_desc:
This guy looks like he could easily kill you while still carrying quite a few
firebreathers.
long_desc: A waiter is here.

detail_desc:
Salazar looks like quite an entrepreneur.  He knows how to keep his customers
happy, but that doesn't mean he's a pushover!
long_desc: Salazar is standing here, eager to serve you a special drink.

detail_desc:
She looks as if she would be afraid to break a nail, but if she works here,
then she probably could pull your nails out one by one without you even
noticing.
long_desc: A young, pert, beautiful, and dangerous woman sits behind the desk.

detail_desc:
This man, wearing a jet black cloak pulled high over his face and black
boots, looks like a rough customer.
long_desc: A man hurries by, head down, dressed all in black.

detail_desc: This man must be the most nondescript man you've ever seen.
long_desc: A man hurries by, head down, dressed all in brown.

detail_desc: He looks very strong and wise.  Looks like he doesn't answer to ANYONE.
long_desc: A Peacekeeper is standing here, ready to jump in at the first sign of trouble.

detail_desc: A large man with no expression whatsoever showing beneath his visored helm.
long_desc: A member of the City Constable stands here.
short_desc: a member of the city constable

detail_desc: What a tough job he has.
long_desc: A sanitary engineer is walking around, cleaning up.

detail_desc: A large man with no expression whatsoever showing beneath his visored helm.
long_desc: A member of the city constable stands here.
short_desc: a member of the city constable

detail_desc: He looks pretty mean, and you imagine he'd do anything for money.
long_desc: A mercenary is waiting for a job here.

detail_desc:
A drunk who seems to not be able to handle his drink, and to carry too much
money.
long_desc: A sullen, sloppy drunk is here practically laying on the bar.

detail_desc: The beggar looks up at you with pleading eyes.
long_desc: A beggar is here, asking for a few coins.

detail_desc:
The stableman, or more aptly put, stableboy, is a young man earning extra
money to help support his family.
long_desc: A stableman is here, ready to take your steed.

detail_desc: A big, strong, helpful, trustworthy constable.
long_desc: A member of the City Constable is here, guarding against trouble.
short_desc: a member of the city constable

detail_desc:
Grubby from head to toe, this poor fella looks like he was born on the
streets.
long_desc:
A pale, skinny street urchin is here looking for any handouts or
valuable garbage.

detail_desc: The man looks at you, tips his hat, and say,"good day to you, my friend.  "
long_desc: A Jareth commoner walks by you.

detail_desc: Prosperous, this man walks by whistling a merry tune.
long_desc: One of the town folk of Jareth is here.
short_desc: one of the town folk of Jareth

detail_desc: Dressed in his finest, this little man must have been to see the Lord.
long_desc: A sniveling fop of a courtier walks by you, his nose in the air.

detail_desc:
Beautifully tanned, long shapely legs, and DEVOTED to Kaan.  Wait!  What's
that mark on her left boob?  Well, I'll be damned!  It's a tatoo!  It reads
"Rodger's a sex-machine!  "
long_desc: A woman wearing a bikini and a sash reading Miss Hawaii stands here proudly.

detail_desc: Pretty mean looking for a mage, better be cool.
long_desc: The Guard for the Guild of Mages stands here.

detail_desc: He may be wearing a robe, but I bet he could still kick your ass.
long_desc: The Guard for the Guild of Clerics stands here.

detail_desc: Now THIS is one mean motherfucker.
long_desc: The Guard for the Guild of Warriors stands here.

detail_desc: Wiry, lean and ready to beat your ass.
long_desc: The Guard for the Guild of Rangers stands here.

detail_desc: Do NOT mess with this man.
long_desc: The Guard for the Guild of Assassins stands here.

detail_desc:
Sorry, buddy.  No peeking this one is all Kaan's.  One feature seems to stand
out though...  What's that tatooed on her ass???  Ahh, it's some letters that
spell, "Djinn's MY pimp!  " hmm, how interesting.
long_desc: A woman wearing a thong and pasties wearing a bright sash reading Miss Florida stands here.

detail_desc:
As you get in closer for a better look, you see that Wayn has a set of nose
plugs in, attached to a head strap.  So that's his trick!
long_desc: Wayn stands here, smiling, waiting to help you.  You wonder how he could possibly be smiling in this stench.

detail_desc: The cartwright looks to be owner, operator, and builder of these fine carts.
long_desc: The cartwright waits here, ready to answer any questions.

detail_desc: The puppy looks like a cute, little, fierce fighter.
long_desc: A small loyal puppy is here.

detail_desc: The beagle looks like a fierce fighter.
long_desc: A small, quick, loyal beagle is here.

detail_desc: The rottweiler looks like a strong, fierce fighter.
long_desc: A large, loyal rottweiler is here.

detail_desc: The wolf looks like a strong, fearless fighter.
long_desc: A large, trained wolf is here.

detail_desc:
You notice a tired look in her face.  She looks like she isn't paid well
enough to put up with any crap from mud players with attitudes.
long_desc: The cryogenicist is here, playing with a canister of liquid nitrogen.

detail_desc:
The jeweler has an eyepiece shoved in one squinted eye, and looks if he may
be a tough bargainer.
long_desc: The jeweler stands behind his display case.
